remix_method: single-source vocal bootleg: keep ONE lead vocal (+ often one melodic hook from the source), rebuild the instrumental in a melodic-trap style

groove.feel: half-time trap hats over laid-back backbeat
groove.syncopation: restrained; lives in hat rolls + vocal-chop placement

spectral_signature.low_end: prominent 808 sub, restrained in chill remixes
spectral_signature.highs_air: trap hats/rolls + light reverb; not harsh

foreground_policy: source lead vocal stays foreground; synth/piano lead may share instrumental sections
arrangement: vocal-led intro over piano -> 808 half-time drop -> breakdown strips to vocal+piano+reverb
harvestability: highly decomposable modular layers (vocal, piano hook, trap kit, 808, pad); anchor = the single source vocal

engine_mapping.note: estimates from sonic character, not measured; brighter than Pretty Lights (trap hats), 808-sub-forward low end

sources: tunebat.com High You Are Branchez Remix
confidence: medium (BPM/method high; spectral qualitative; exact shares inferred)
